seoTitle: Womina vs Wonbah Forest — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Womina and Wonbah Forest. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Womina vs Wonbah Forest: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Womina and Wonbah Forest.
heading: Womina vs Wonbah Forest — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Womina, Queensland and Wonbah Forest, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Womina has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Wonbah Forest (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Womina or Wonbah Forest safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Womina has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Wonbah Forest scores 20/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Womina scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Wonbah Forest scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Womina or Wonbah Forest?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Womina has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.47% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
